item.title: American Cfl Teams A New Era Of North American Football
item.description: Federal law does not equate nationality with race or ethnicity but rather with citizenship.

item.title: American Teams In The Cfl An Intriguing Chapter In Football History
item.description: Book an american airlines vacations℠ package to u.s destinations and save explore vacation deals add a car to your trip from coastlines to canyons, save up to 35% and earn 500 bonus.

item.title: Amber Rose Revah A Journey Through Talent And Inspiration
item.description: Amber was frequently used in jewelry and amulets for adornment and as a symbol of status.
